Name: Skill Speed Boost
Author: Jared
Description: Skill progression control with per-skill XP multipliers (0-10x), difficulty profiles (VanillaPlus/Casual/Hardcore/Grinder/Balanced/Legacy), natural staleness decay (3 in-game hours), morning XP bonus window, and area familiarity (per-location XP bonus that grows the more you forage there). Configure each skill's learning rate independently.
